description: RadHDL-native Gowin GW5A FPiGA Audio Hat port using RADIF/RADDSP modules and the original board constraints.

checks: RadHDL-only source set synthesized and placed/routed
ADC I2S pins I2S_BCK, I2S_LRCK_ADC, and I2S_SDA_ADC were constrained and placed
No legacy FPiGA_I2C, FPiGA_I2S, FPiGA_Audio_DSP, FPiGA_WaveTable, I2CSLAVE, WaveTableBram, AUD_DSP_MULT, or fpiga_clks modules are instantiated

audio_paths.pi_playback: Raspberry Pi I2S DIN is captured by RADIF I2S and routed through the RadDSP stereo gain stage to the codec DAC output.
audio_paths.codec_adc: Codec ADC I2S data is captured by a second RADIF I2S instance and can be selected or mixed into the DAC path through DSP_CONTROL.
audio_paths.synth: DSP_MODE 0x01 selects a RadHDL-native four-oscillator phase-accumulator synth path controlled by the existing frequency and waveform registers.

registers.name: ID
registers.description: FPGA design ID. The RadHDL-native top returns 0x01.

registers.name: SOFT_RST
registers.description: Software reset control. Bit 0 releases the system datapath after PLL lock.

registers.name: SOFT_EN
registers.description: General design enable control. Bit 0 drives the board mute-enable output.

registers.name: CONF0
registers.description: Audio routing enable. Nonzero values enable DAC stream output.

registers.name: DSP_MODE
registers.description: DSP mode. 0x00 passes Pi playback, 0x01 selects synth, and other values preserve pass-through behavior.

registers.name: FREQ0
registers.description: Oscillator 0 phase increment.

registers.name: FREQ1
registers.description: Oscillator 1 phase increment.

registers.name: FREQ2
registers.description: Oscillator 2 phase increment.

registers.name: FREQ3
registers.description: Oscillator 3 phase increment.

registers.name: OSC_WAVE_SELECT
registers.description: Four packed 2-bit oscillator waveform selectors.

registers.name: VOICE_GATE
registers.description: Reserved voice gate bitmap preserved for software compatibility.

registers.name: WAVE_STATUS_CONTROL
registers.description: Read returns ready status. Write pulses are counted for software-compatible wavetable load sequencing.

registers.name: WAVE_DATA
registers.description: Software-compatible wavetable sample write data.

registers.name: DSP_CONTROL
registers.description: DSP control flags. Bit 1 selects codec ADC monitor; bit 2 mixes codec ADC with Pi playback.

registers.name: LEFT_VOLUME
registers.description: Left output gain coefficient. Zero maps to unity gain for pass-through compatibility.

registers.name: RIGHT_VOLUME
registers.description: Right output gain coefficient. Zero maps to unity gain for pass-through compatibility.

registers.name: OSC0_VOLUME
registers.description: Oscillator 0 synth gain coefficient.

registers.name: OSC1_VOLUME
registers.description: Oscillator 1 synth gain coefficient.

registers.name: OSC2_VOLUME
registers.description: Oscillator 2 synth gain coefficient.

registers.name: OSC3_VOLUME
registers.description: Oscillator 3 synth gain coefficient.
